payload.description: Execute end-to-end smoke validation of the full autonomous governance loop following completion of P3.2A (TASK-P3-0012). Scope: (1) Verify that .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml on main branch contains the dispatch role filter introduced in commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5, confirming unsupported next_actor_role values are replaced with NONE before ledger-updated dispatch. (2) Verify that .github/workflows/auditor-runner.yml contains the server-side current_task.json update step introduced in TASK-P3-0011 (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae), confirming the step is strictly gated on decision == PRE_ACTION_APPROVED and writes required fields (schema_version, status, task_id, payload, updated_by, updated_at) via GitHub Contents API. (3) Verify that .github/workflows/analyst-verifier-runner.yml exists on main branch (introduced in TASK-P2-0009, commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26) with workflow_dispatch trigger accepting inputs task_id, verification_result, reason, parent_event_id, and dispatches ledger-updated with next_actor_role=AUDITOR on VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED. (4) Confirm governance/ledger/ reflects ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema_version v162 and correct commit_sha values. (5) Confirm no open VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain unresolved for TASK-P3-0011 or TASK-P3-0012. Proof target: written smoke validation report committed to governance/smoke/ as smoke-e2e-0001-report.json containing pass/fail status per check item, referencing commit SHAs and file paths inspected. This task satisfies roadmap discipline by closing the verification gap left by TASK-P3-0012 ACTION_COMPLETED before advancing to any new P3+ infrastructure tasks.
payload.proof_target: governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json committed to main branch containing structured pass/fail results for all five smoke check items with referenced commit SHAs and file paths
payload.description: Execute end-to-end smoke test of the autonomous multi-agent governance loop as implemented through P2 and P3 phases. The smoke test must verify that a full cycle completes without manual intervention: (1) ANALYST proposes a minimal well-scoped task and writes governance/tasks/TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001.json to the repository; (2) auditor-runner.yml receives workflow_dispatch, reads the task payload, applies PRE_ACTION_APPROVED gate, writes governance/current_task.json via GitHub Contents API using SA-backed token; (3) ledger-updated dispatch routes to CLOUD_CODE; (4) CLOUD_CODE executor performs a trivially verifiable mutation (e.g., appends a timestamped line to governance/smoke_test_log.txt); (5) ACTION_COMPLETED event is written to ledger; (6) analyst-verifier-runner.yml receives VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED and writes the final ledger event with next_actor_role=AUDITOR. Proof target is the presence of governance/smoke_test_log.txt on main branch with a committed timestamped entry, plus a complete ledger trail containing TASK_PROPOSED, PRE_ACTION_APPROVED, ACTION_COMPLETED, and VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED events all referencing task_id TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0001. This task validates that all infrastructure built in P2 and P3 (auditor-runner current_task write, dispatch role filter, analyst-verifier-runner, ledger writer path) operates correctly as an integrated autonomous loop under v164 schema_version compliance.
